title: pleroma stellipile
side_effects: Pleroma stellipile can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to stomach ulcers and vomiting. Long-term misuse of the plant has also been linked to kidney damage and liver failure in some individuals. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can cause skin irritation and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
